rubricContent.textProperty: The agent performs data exploration (describe_geodataframe) before running analysis or optimization.

rubrics.description: Ensures the agent follows proper workflow: exploration → processing → analysis.

rubricContent.textProperty: The agent uses FFI calculation tools (ffi) before running DRL optimization (drl_model).

rubrics.description: Validates correct tool call sequence for optimization pipeline.

rubricContent.textProperty: The agent provides valid parameters to tools (e.g., file paths, column names, thresholds).

rubrics.description: Checks if tool parameters are reasonable and match the data schema.

rubricContent.textProperty: The response includes key metrics from the analysis (e.g., FFI values, DRL optimization results).

rubrics.description: Ensures the final response contains substantive findings.

rubricContent.textProperty: The response accurately reflects the tool outputs (e.g., FFI range 0-1, DRL swap counts).

rubrics.description: Validates factual correctness of reported results.

rubricContent.textProperty: The response provides actionable insights or recommendations based on the analysis.

rubrics.description: Checks if the response goes beyond raw data to offer interpretation.

rubricContent.textProperty: The response is clear, well-structured, and easy to understand.
